name: leya
description: Leya plugins for Claude Code — Latin American legal research over a fresh, indexed corpus. Covers Guatemala and República Dominicana today; more LATAM jurisdictions in progress.

plugins.name: leya-legal
plugins.description: Search and cite Latin American legal documents — laws, decrees, court rulings, and congressional initiatives — directly from the Leya corpus. Guatemala and República Dominicana available now.
